title: anthomeles aestivalis
intro: Anthomeles aestivalis, also known as the Snowberry Ash or Ashberry, is a deciduous shrub native to the eastern parts of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Anthomeles aestivalis include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Anthomeles aestivalis is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal remedies.
